rule CDB_July_2026_Patch_Tuesday_Microsoft_Patche {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for July 2026 Patch Tuesday: Microsoft Patches 622 Vulnerabilities Including Two Exp"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-24"
    strings:

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 47 threat advisories. Of these, 2 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 23 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
